[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000010 1
1 00101000 2
2 10010100 3
3 10001011 4
4 10101101 5
5 00000100 1
6 01101001 4
7 11000100 3

01 10 01111001 5
12 21 00011110 4
23 32 00100110 3
34 43 10101001 4
45 54 01101101 5
56 65 10101101 5 match 4
67 76 11000111 5
70 07 11101111 7

02 20 01100111 5
13 31 00111000 3
24 42 10001111 5
35 53 11000100 3 match 7
46 64 11000000 2
57 75 01101010 4
60 06 00101000 2 match 1
71 17 10010110 4

03 30 01000001 2
14 41 10010001 3
25 52 11100010 4
36 63 01101001 4 match 6
47 74 00000111 3
50 05 10000101 3
61 16 01010001 3
72 27 10001000 2

04 40 11101000 4
15 51 11111100 6
26 62 01001111 5
37 73 10101110 5
